pattern: DP where dp[i][j] is the length of the longest good subsequence ending at index i with exactly j transitions; transition from same-value indices costs 0, different values cost 1.
hints: Define dp[i][j] = length of longest good subsequence ending at position i using exactly j same-to-different transitions.
When appending nums[i] after nums[p]: if nums[p]==nums[i], dp[i][j] can extend dp[p][j]+1; if nums[p]!=nums[i], dp[i][j] can extend dp[p][j-1]+1.
With n≤500 and k≤25, an O(n^2 * k) DP is fast enough.

edge_inputs.description: k equals length-1, any subsequence valid
all same elements, k=0 gives full length
k=1 allows one transition between different values

stress.description: random array with few distinct values
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = min(size, 200)
    vals = [rng.randint(1, 5) for _ in range(n)]
    k = rng.randint(0, min(25, n))
    return [vals, k]
